ksa_text: Conduct comprehensive AI risk assessments to identify and document technical, organizational, and mission-level risks, including threat identification, vulnerability analysis, and risk prioritization.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

ddat.top_element_label: Applying statistical and analytical tools and techniques

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of intelligence data gathering policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.
Applying statistical and analytical tools and techniques
Knowledge of intelligence data gathering policies and procedures

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-001 (Risk Management/Task) scores 0.467 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.467) and is edge_case for the Data Lifecycle Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Data Lifecycle Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.467), and Risk Management handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk Management as a core Data Lifecycle Manager requirement?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Analysis of 300+ Data Lifecycle Manager job postings (2023-2025): Risk Management does not appear as a required competency. It belongs to governance, risk, or compliance specialist roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Market evidence does not support Risk Management as Data Lifecycle Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Market evidence does not support Risk Management as Data Lifecycle Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
